title: Mushroom Village Fairy
summary: Tiny fairy with a lantern on a glowing toadstool in a magical bioluminescent forest.
prompt: A miniature forest scene: a small fairy with translucent dragonfly wings sitting on the cap of a giant red-with-white-spots toadstool mushroom, holding a tiny lantern. Other glowing mushroom houses with windows and chimneys visible behind. Magical bioluminescent atmosphere, deep teal forest, fireflies, soft golden light from the lantern. Storybook illustration style, painterly textures, square format.
